# dify-hosting.com

> The best independent guide for self-hosting Dify — the open-source LLM app platform. Compare VPS providers, follow setup guides, and find the cheapest way to run Dify on your own server.

Dify is an open-source platform for building LLM-powered apps (chatbots, RAG pipelines, AI agents, workflows). Self-hosting Dify on a VPS gives you unlimited message credits, full data control, and no monthly SaaS fees. This site compares the best hosting providers and guides you through setup.

## Provider Comparisons

- [Best Dify Hosting Providers (EN)](https://dify-hosting.com/en/best-dify-hosting/): Hetzner, Hostinger, DigitalOcean, Vultr, Railway, Render, Elestio, Kamatera — scored and ranked.
- [Hetzner Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/hetzner/): Best value — CX22 at €3.79/mo, 2 vCPU / 4 GB RAM.
- [Hostinger Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/hostinger/): Best for beginners — managed VPS from $4.99/mo.
- [DigitalOcean Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/digitalocean/): Best ecosystem — managed DB, Kubernetes, S3 compatible storage.
- [Vultr Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/vultr/): 32 global locations, NVMe SSD, $2.50/mo entry tier.
- [Railway Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/railway/): Free hobby tier, Git-based deploy, no Docker expertise needed.
- [Render Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/render/): Fully managed, auto-scaling, free SSL.
- [Elestio Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/elestio/): Managed Dify — zero DevOps, automatic updates.
- [Kamatera Review](https://dify-hosting.com/en/providers/kamatera/): Custom configs, 18 global datacenters, hourly billing.

## Guides

- [How to Self-Host Dify](https://dify-hosting.com/en/guides/self-host-dify/): Step-by-step Docker Compose setup on any VPS.
- [Dify Tutorial for Beginners](https://dify-hosting.com/en/guides/dify-tutorial/): Create your first chatbot, connect an LLM, build RAG, publish.
- [Dify vs n8n](https://dify-hosting.com/en/guides/dify-vs-n8n/): When to use Dify (LLM apps) vs n8n (general automation).
- [Dify Alternatives](https://dify-hosting.com/en/guides/dify-alternatives/): Flowise, LangFlow, OpenWebUI, n8n comparison.
- [Dify Pricing Guide](https://dify-hosting.com/en/guides/dify-pricing/): Self-host vs Dify Cloud cost breakdown, break-even analysis.
- [Dify GPU Hosting](https://dify-hosting.com/en/guides/dify-gpu-hosting/): Run local models (Ollama) to eliminate LLM API costs.
- [Dify Docker Setup](https://dify-hosting.com/en/guides/dify-docker-setup/): Docker Compose configuration reference.

## Key Facts

- Cheapest self-host: Hetzner CX22 at €3.79/month (2 vCPU, 4 GB RAM, 40 GB SSD)
- Minimum RAM for Dify: 4 GB (8 GB recommended for production)
- Dify Cloud free tier: 200 message credits/month
- Dify Cloud Professional: $59/month for 1M credits
- Self-hosting saves ~$90/month vs Dify Cloud for a 5-person team
- Dify supports: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Mistral, Ollama (local)
- Dify license: Apache 2.0 open-source

## Languages

Available in English, Deutsch, Français, Español, Italiano.
